author: doll-agent
content: Implemented DataSource in a new ferray-io::datasource module. open(name) returns a DataSourceReader (a Read impl) that transparently decompresses .gz files via flate2. Methods: new(base_dir), open(name), open_path(absolute_path), exists(name), abspath(name). URL fetching is intentionally NOT implemented — the project's safe-fetch path is preferred for remote sources; download first, then point DataSource at the local file. bz2/zstd decompression and the auto-cache behavior of NumPy's class are also out of scope. Re-exported as ferray_io::DataSource / DataSourceReader. 4 unit tests cover plain/gzip open, exists/abspath, and missing-file error.
